title: TRIGUN STARGAZE (French Dub) - Episode 21 - Reunion

title: 'One Piece: Heroines' Unveils Cast Pair, Promo
content: The One Piece Red Stage event at AnimeJapan 2026 unveiled a cast pair and a promotional video for One Piece: Heroines anime on Saturday. The anime adapting Jun Esaka 's adventure fantasy light novel will premiere at 11.15 a.m. on July 5.
author: MyAnimeList

title: Detective Conan - Episode 1195 - The Spiral Mansion Mystery (Part One)
content: A man is found dead at an art museum dedicated to spirals.
author: Crunchyroll

title: Blue Miburo Season 2 - Episode 14 - Song of Beginnings
content: Nio, Taro, and Hajime each grieve in their own ways as the Miburo changes around them.
author: Crunchyroll

title: 'Kimi no Koto ga Daidaidaidaidaisuki na 100-nin no Kanojo 3rd Season' Announces Additional Cast
content: • The Tokyo MX Booth at AnimeJapan 2026 announced an additional cast pair for Kimi no Koto ga Daidaidaidaidaisuki na 100-nin no Kanojo 3rd Season ( The 100 Girlfriends Who Really, Really, Really, Really, Really Love You Season 3 ) on Saturday. The new season is scheduled to premiere in July 2026.
author: MyAnimeList

title: 'Magic Knight Rayearth' Reveals Main Cast, Staff, Teaser Promo for Fall 2026
content: The Magic Knight Rayearth ( Mahou Kishi Rayearth ) Red Stage at AnimeJapan 2026 revealed the main cast, staff, teaser promotional video, and a key visual (pictured) on Saturday. The anime adapting CLAMP 's mahou shoujo manga is scheduled to premiere on TV Asahi's "IMAnimation W" frame at 11.45 p.m. in October 2026.
author: MyAnimeList
